title: /show
text: /show Show the parameters used by the specified Uniface Router service on Microsoft Windows. /show { =" ServiceName " } Arguments ServiceName —name of a Uniface Router service previously installed using the /inst switch. If you do not specify the ServiceName , the default name Uniface Version URouter is assumed. Use With urouter —Uniface Router on Microsoft Windows. For more information, see urouter . Description The /show switch is used only on the command line with urouter.exe to display the parameters with which a Uniface Router service was installed. It is useful for determining errors in unsuccessful attempts to install the Uniface Router. Figure 1. Specified urouter successfully installed D:/Uniface/Uniface10/common/bin>urouter /show="uniface 10 urouter 2" Service 'uniface 10 urouter 2' was installed without parameters. Copy Related Links /inst Install and register the Uniface Router as a Windows service under a unique service name. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
